subject: SDC has python 2.7 pods
commit_message:
SDC has python 2.7 pods

- update filebeat from 5.5.0 to 7.9.1
- move the filebeat value in the parent values.yaml

Issue-ID: SDC-3280
Signed-off-by: JulienBe <julien.bertozzi@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I3125f864d1c1badd2baed49fdf26f1c6ffaa963e
